Fixture 3: Iteration 10 with Quality Gates
- Scenario: 10th iteration, PRD, quality failures, checklist status
- Invocation: build_prompt(0, "./prd.md", 10)
- Expected Behavior: Shows gate failures and checklist status
- Key Variables:
  - gate_failure_context: Present (from gate-failures.txt)
  - checklist_status: Present (from verification-results.json)
  - phases: "SECURITY"
- Test: Verify gate_failure_context and test_summary appear in dynamic context
